title: David Silver
text: Home * People * David Silver David Silver [1] David Silver , a British computer scientist at Google DeepMind , and co-author of AlphaGo and AlphaZero . Before, since 2010, he was researcher at University College London , postdoc at Massachusetts Institute of Technology [2] , Ph.D student and postdoc at University of Alberta , and CTO for Elixir Studios and lead programmer on the PC strategy game Republic: the Revolution [3] . His research interests covers simulation-based search, reinforcement learning , and cooperative pathfinding .
